description: Renders a piecewise-defined 3D surface with alternating expression-condition pairs in x and y.
utility: Plot a piecewise-defined surface on a g3d graph

arguments.name: expression1
arguments.description: First piece expression in x, y

arguments.name: condition1
arguments.description: Domain condition for the first piece

arguments.name: expression2
arguments.description: Second piece expression in x, y

arguments.name: condition2
arguments.description: Domain condition for the second piece

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional: c(), fc(), fo() for color and styling

alternates.description: Piecewise surface with explicit domain and color

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
piecewiseplot3d(G, "x^2 + y^2", "x > 0", "x - y", "x <= 0")

G = g3d(at(10,10), view(30, 30))
piecewiseplot3d(G, "sin(x)*cos(y)", "x + y > 0", "0", "x + y <= 0", range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3), c(teal))
